Create Tables

Create users and analytics tables for admin

Module of the creation tables for the DB.

class create_table.CreateTable(connection, cursor)[source]

Class of the creation tables for admin.

Parameters:

connection (Connection) –

create()[source]

Create users table in MySQL.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

create_analytics()[source]

Create analytics table in MySQL.

Returns:

None.
